title: fix: correct xAI video API parameter from image_url to image
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Grok gets the picture
gist.blurb: Fixed a tiny typo in our xAI video integration so image-to-video generation works perfectly. Time to bring those pixels to life!
gist.summary: Corrected the image parameter name in the xAI video model integration to align with their API documentation.
gist.impact: Users can now successfully generate videos from images using the Grok video model without encountering parameter errors.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a mechanic, fixing a video film strip. Represents fixing the image-to-video pipeline for the xAI model.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, using a wrench to fix a glowing film strip. A retro computer monitor in the background shows a static image transforming into a moving video. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, using a wrench to fix a glowing film strip. A retro computer monitor in the background shows a static image transforming into a moving video. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
